message:
feat(geodesic): add decision ledger tests + E2E refinements (bd-36yp, bd-1i1w)

- Add 5 ledger tests: exact_has_algorithm_selected, greedy_records_choices,
  beam_records_prunes, deterministic, summary_is_readable
- Export DecisionLedger/DecisionEntry/normalize_with_ledger in trace::mod
- Minor E2E test refinements from concurrent agent coordination
- Includes concurrent agent contributions: ledger implementation,
  additional tests, golden checksum pinning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
